transcript:
Speaker A: मैं स्कूल जा रही हूँ [I am going to school]
Speaker B: I am going to school.
Speaker A: आज मैं स्कूल जाकर Maths पढूँगी [Today, I will go to school and study Maths.]
Speaker B: Today, I will go to school and study Maths.
Speaker A: मेरे लंच में मेरी माँ ने tasty खाना डाला है [My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch.]
Speaker B: My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch.
Speaker A: वाह, तुम्हारी English तो बहुत अच्छी है। ये तुमने कहाँ से सीखी? [Wow, your English is very good. Where did you learn this from?]
Speaker B: वो मैंने MySivi ऐप से सीखी। [I learned that from the MySivi app.]
Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?]
Speaker B: इस ऐप में एक AI टीचर है, जो कि बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करवाती है। और कोई गलती हुई, तो तुरंत करेक्ट भी कर देती है। [In this app, there is an AI teacher who helps practice English without judgment. And if there's any mistake, she corrects it immediately.]
Speaker A: वाह! पर ये ऐप तो महँगा होगा ना? [Wow! But this app must be expensive, right?]
Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। मैंने सिर्फ ₹1 में शुरू किया था। तो तुम भी कर सकती हो। [Not at all. I started for just ₹1. So you can too.]
Speaker A: Wow, amazing! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow, amazing! Then how do I start?]
Speaker B: Install बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, एंड अपनी 15 डेज इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Click on the Install button, install the MySivi app, and start your 15 days English learning challenge.]
Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text:
मैं स्कूल जा रही हूँ [I am going to school]
I AM GOING TO SCHOOL
आज मैं स्कूल जाकर Maths पढूँगी [Today, I will go to school and study Maths.]
TODAY, I WILL GO TO SCHOOL AND STUDY MATHS.
मेरे लंच में मेरी माँ ने tasty खाना डाला है [My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch.]
MY MOTHER HAS PACKED TASTY FOOD IN MY LUNCH.
MySivi
MySivi Premium
3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1
Install Now
summary: An animated skit featuring two school children discussing how one of them improved his English speaking skills. He attributes his progress to the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher and affordable ₹1 trial. The ad concludes with a call-to-action prompting viewers to install the app.
